'''Vincol Dunker''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] militia [[Officer/Legends|officer]] and [[Musician/Legends|musician]]. He was a member of the [[Fighting 357th Serenaders]], a militia band from [[Bela Vistal/Legends|Bela Vistal]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

Sometime following [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], his band went on a training exercise out in the wild. After they had returned to base, his comrade [[Grondorn Muse]] discovered that he had forgotten his [[Kloo horn/Legends|kloo horn]] out in the wildness. Dunker went back to retrieve it but got lost in the wild because of his poor sense of direction and had to call Muse for help. Muse hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to find Dunker and escort him back to the city.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|250px|thumb|Every possible depiction of Vincol Dunker]]
Vincol Dunker was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Due to the nature of many older [[:w:c:swg:Quest|quests]] in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the [[Species/Legends|species]] and appearance of Vincol Dunker changed each time a player performed this quest. Therefore, it is impossible to verify the [[canon]]ical species of Dunker. However, the quest dialogue given by [[Grondorn Muse|Muse]] indicated that Vincol Dunker was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]. Although not mentioned in the quest dialogue, examining Dunker consistently identified him as an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]].
